Notice Of Defualt Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Eagle Cafe, LP, a California limited partnership and Wallace Parker, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Patricia Dowling, CSR #5388. Email: pdowling@sftc.org.

Robert Collins, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff US Foods, Inc.
Susan Strebeck, Credit Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Eagle Cafe, LP, a California limited partnership or Wallace Parker, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Open Book Account, Account Stated and Breach of Personal Guarantee was filed on February 20, 2019 and personally served on defendant Eagle Cafe, LP's Registered Agent on April 8, 2019.
Plaintiff's complaint was personally served on defendant Wallace Parker on April 8, 2019.
Default as to defendants Eagle Cafe, LP and Wallace Parker was entered on May 20, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 20, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff US Foods, Inc., and against the defaulted defendants Eagle Cafe, LP, a California limited partnership and Wallace Parker, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $28,922.21.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,193.32.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $693.00.
Total - $36,633.53.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
